mapper.sql: id, user_id, name, type, icon, color, initial_balance, credit_limit, include_in_net_worth, allow_transfer, enable_alert, alert_threshold, sort_order, is_deleted, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM account WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM account WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, created_at ASC
SELECT FROM account WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND type = #{type} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, created_at ASC

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM account WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND name = #{name} AND is_deleted = 0
AND id != #{excludeId}

SELECT COALESCE(a.initial_balance, 0) + COALESCE(SUM(e.debit), 0) - COALESCE(SUM(e.credit), 0) FROM account a LEFT JOIN entry e ON e.account_id = a.id AND e.account_type = 'account' LEFT JOIN `transaction` t ON t.id = e.transaction_id AND t.is_deleted = 0 WHERE a.id = #{accountId} AND a.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY a.id, a.initial_balance
